input_preview:
claim: NVIDIA and Google are leading 800 VDC adoption ahead of schedule, with small-volume shipments starting around Q3 2026; Vertiv and Delta are relevant suppliers.
evidence_span: NVIDIA describes 800 VDC as next-generation power distribution for AI factories and lists electrical ecosystem partners including Delta and Vertiv.
source_class: primary_official

claim: A seven-stock European photonics basket maps to CPO, InP lasers, silicon photonics, glass processing, and AI data-center optical interconnect themes; the stock basket itself is implied to be investable.
evidence_span: LPKF says its LIDE technology enables glass processing for advanced semiconductor packaging from ramp-up to high-volume manufacturing.
source_class: primary_official

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: NVIDIA reported record Q1 FY2027 revenue and data-center revenue, showing AI data-center demand as the main operating driver.
source_class: primary_official

claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_span: AMD's IR materials describe Q1 2026 as driven by accelerating AI infrastructure demand and data-center growth.
source_class: primary_official

claim: Hyperscalers are spending heavily on AI data centers, NVIDIA captures the first revenue/profit wave, and memory becomes a next bottleneck.
evidence_span: Micron prepared remarks say data-center revenue exceeded $25B and DRAM/NAND demand significantly exceeds supply.
source_class: primary_official

claim: Roundhill launched DRAM as a pure memory ETF in April 2026, bundling memory names such as Micron, SK hynix, Samsung, SanDisk, Western Digital, and Seagate; social posts also cite large YTD gains.
evidence_span: MarketWatch describes the Roundhill Memory ETF as recently launched and notes rapid gains and volatility in the memory-chip sector.
source_class: auditable_secondary

claim: AI compute hardware bottlenecks are moving into low-loss materials, orthogonal backplanes, glass substrates, and CPO; this creates a structural investment window.
evidence_span: Sivers/GF collaboration supports optical connectivity architectures including CPO and LPO for data-center interconnects.
source_class: primary_official

claim: TSMC moved glass substrate development from lab toward production validation with Ibiden and Innolux, extending CoWoS for AI chips.
evidence_span: TSMC annual material discusses advanced packaging and 3D stacking, including CoWoS and photonic-engine roadmap work.
source_class: primary_official

claim: Many SPY/QQQ retail investors entered after 2020 and may underestimate drawdowns, making index DCA psychologically riskier than they expect.
evidence_span: SEC investor resources warn about stock recommendations and investment decision-making based on social media.
source_class: regulatory_warning

claim: Many SPY/QQQ retail investors entered after 2020 and may underestimate drawdowns, making index DCA psychologically riskier than they expect.
